items.school: EMF — École de Maturité et de Formation

bio: I'm Killian, a 22-year-old full-stack developer based in Bouloz, Switzerland. I started coding in 2017, drawn in by a simple dream: making my own video game. That dream is still alive — I'm actively building it in C# with Unity.

By day I work at UNOPS and Div-In, building tools that help people. By night I'm crafting side projects, exploring new tech and trying to push my limits — whether on a keyboard or on a mountain trail.
I'm a passionate, spontaneous person who loves discovering new things. Open source, freedom and creativity are non-negotiable for me.

items.label: Freedom
items.desc: Non-negotiable in code and in life. I thrive with autonomy and avoid unnecessary constraints.

items.label: Enthusiasm
items.desc: I dive into everything with full energy. If something excites me, I go all in.

items.label: Creativity
items.desc: From game design to web interfaces, I approach dev as a creative act — not just an engineering one.

items.label: Open Source
items.desc: I believe in sharing knowledge and building in the open. Closed systems hold everyone back.

contact.title: Let's build something together
contact.desc: Open to freelance missions, exciting collaborations and interesting conversations.
